positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a group of smiling forest animals—a deer, a fox, a raccoon, and a blue jay—playing together under a canopy of luminous autumn leaves. The style should be highly detailed, vector-art inspired, with clean, thick outlines and a limited, rich color palette (deep sapphire, burnt orange, moss green, and gold accents). The animals should be facing forward in a symmetrical, circular composition, suitable for a central chest print on a hoodie. Use soft backlighting to create dramatic silhouettes and high contrast against the richly textured background foliage. Minimalist yet vibrant, perfect for screen printing.
